arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Madrid 1-0 Valencia; Liga F
arts.sum: 26’ GOAL (1-0) by Olga Carmona: Athenea’s attempted cross from the left side got blocked but before Valencia could clear it, Athenea ran in to pass it back to Olga at the entrance of the box. All notable attacks were through the left side, starring Olga and Athenea, while Feller and Bruun would be awaiting their crosse inside the box.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid have given Burger King a problem
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s midweek defeat to Lille in the Champions League is set to lead to a new item on the Burger King menu. The defeat means Los Blancos are now 17th in the league phase of this season’s Champions League and it’s strangely set to result in a new Burger King item.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Villarreal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Madrid and Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s home match against Villarreal . Can Real Madrid bounce back?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid youngster signs new contract
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Joan Martínez has on Friday put pen to paper on a new contract with the club. Youngster Joan, for his part, is of course sidelined long-term at…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Villarreal
arts.sum: Having added Kylian Mbappe to their exceptionally-talented squad ahead of the 2024/25 season, many expected Real Madrid to be invincible this term. Wednesday brought Madrid's first defeat of the campaign as Lille shocked them in the league phase of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé included in Real Madrid squad to face Villarreal despite France squad absence
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé (25) has been included in Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid squad to face Villarreal on Saturday night in La Liga despite being excluded from Didier Deschamps’ France squad for…

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. Valencia: Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Chavas, Oihane, Rocío, M. Méndez, Olga, Toletti, Leupolz, Feller, Weir, Athenea, Bruun

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce midfielder’s return in squad to face Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid announced their squad to face Villarreal on Friday afternoon and with it comes the return of one of their midfielders from injury. This is the only change from…

arts.ttl: 'Wow': Antonio Rudiger says player Tottenham sold for £11m is the most underrated player he's ever seen
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur aren’t the most decorated club in the Premier League, but they have had some fantastic players represent the club over the years. The...
